attackResults.name: Self-Rating Attack
attackResults.vector: Actor attempts to submit a rating for themselves
mitigations: Identity normalisation + strict self-check in SubmitRating
attackResults.error: 10 ABORTED: failed to endorse transaction, see attached details for more info

attackResults.name: Sybil Attack (coordinated inflation)
attackResults.vector: 5 Sybil identities each rate the same actor with maximum score
mitigations: Stake requirement — each Sybil must lock capital
Meta-reputation weighting — new accounts carry low weight
Wilson CI — low-confidence actors flagged by wide confidence interval
attackResults.outcome: PARTIAL MITIGATION — attack executed but effects are limited

details.observation: Score shifted by 0.2448 — stake cost limited amplification; CI width signals low confidence

attackResults.name: Collusion Attack (rating ring)
attackResults.vector: Colluding raters mutually inflate each other's reputation
mitigations: Meta-reputation — new accounts have low weight; circular inflation has diminishing returns
Stake capital at risk — collusion can be penalised via disputes
Dispute mechanism — any actor can challenge a suspicious rating
attackResults.outcome: PARTIAL MITIGATION — attack executed but effects are limited

details.observation: Mutual ratings recorded but low meta-reputation weight limits amplification

attackResults.name: Unauthorized Access Attack
mitigations: Role-based access control via ADMIN_LIST on-chain registry
attackResults.error: 10 ABORTED: failed to endorse transaction, see attached details for more info

attackResults.name: Unauthorized Admin Grant
attackResults.vector: Non-admin attempts to grant admin rights to themselves
attackResults.error: 10 ABORTED: failed to endorse transaction, see attached details for more info

attackResults.name: Insufficient Stake Attack
attackResults.vector: Actor without stake attempts to submit a rating
mitigations: Minimum stake check in SubmitRating — balance must be ≥ minStakeRequired
attackResults.error: 10 ABORTED: failed to endorse transaction, see attached details for more info

attackResults.name: Evidence Tampering Attack
attackResults.vector: Attacker submits a rating with a fabricated/random evidence hash
mitigations: Evidence is stored as an opaque hash — the chaincode does not verify the hash's pre-image
Off-chain verification: auditors check the hash against the real evidence document
Dispute mechanism: any party can challenge ratings with suspicious evidence
Recommendation: integrate IPFS-based evidence anchoring in production
attackResults.outcome: PARTIAL MITIGATION — attack executed but effects are limited

details.observation: Rating accepted — evidence hash is not pre-image verified on-chain. Mitigation is off-chain audit.

attackResults.name: Reputation Gate Bypass Attack
attackResults.vector: Actor below reputation threshold attempts a gated integrated operation
attackResults.error: 10 ABORTED: failed to endorse transaction, see attached details for more info

attackResults.name: Provenance Replay Attack
attackResults.vector: Attacker replays an existing asset creation to overwrite provenance history
mitigations: AssetExists() check in CreateMaterialCertification prevents duplicate asset creation
attackResults.error: 10 ABORTED: failed to endorse transaction, see attached details for more info
